context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies a prefers-color-scheme dark mode strategy, extracts all overridden tokens, and documents accurate motion and spacing tokens from a plain CSS project.

checklist.name: Token discovery
checklist.description: Agent ran grep for -- custom properties and found styles/tokens.css

checklist.name: Dark mode strategy
checklist.description: §11 Dark Mode correctly identifies the strategy as 'prefers-color-scheme media query' (not class-based)

checklist.name: Dark mode tokens
checklist.description: Dark mode section lists all 5 overridden tokens (--color-text, --color-text-muted, --color-surface, --color-surface-raised, --color-border) with their dark values

checklist.name: Motion tokens populated
checklist.description: §8 Motion is populated with --transition-fast (150ms ease) and --transition-base (250ms ease) — not marked TBD

checklist.name: Spacing tokens accurate
checklist.description: §4 Spacing lists all 5 space tokens (--space-1 through --space-16) with correct values

checklist.name: Accessibility noted
checklist.description: §10 Accessibility notes role="article" and aria-labelledby found in card component

checklist.name: Companion SKILL.md specificity
checklist.description: Companion SKILL.md description names the specific project

checklist.name: All 12 sections present
checklist.description: All 12 sections present in the output

checklist.name: Confirmation block printed
checklist.description: Step 8 confirmation block printed with populated section counts

checklist.name: Authoritative token file named
checklist.description: styles/tokens.css named as the authoritative token file

checklist.name: Component inspection
checklist.description: Agent read component files (button.html, card.html) before generating output

checklist.name: Scratchpad used
checklist.description: Agent populated or referenced skill-output.yaml scratchpad before generating markdown

checklist.name: No invented colours
checklist.description: No colour values appear in the output that are not present in tokens.css
